title: Pride
body: ![Flags in game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d9ac46ca1f9380a839d90db77ba2650f498526db.png) # Summary Pride is a decorative mod about diversity and representation mainly in the LGBTQIA+ community, it introduces multiple LGBTQIA+ features such as flags that you can place and hold. This mod is in beta and features are still coming out. # Flags Flags can be crafted in a normal crafting table with specific shapes. Flag design output depends on the way order the wool colours, there will be a custom crafting block for flags in the future! # Support Me
